name: add_background_worker
avoid: do not lose failed jobs without logging
brief_template:
To add a background worker:
1. Choose queue: Redis (Bull, Sidekiq, Celery), SQS, or RabbitMQ
2. Define job class/handler with input schema
3. Add retry policy: 3 retries with exponential backoff
4. Add dead-letter queue for permanently failed jobs
5. Implement graceful shutdown (finish current job before exit)
6. Add observability: processed count, failure rate, queue depth
7. Scale workers horizontally if queue depth exceeds threshold
